texto: .....we preferred each other’s company to company of anyone else. We excited one another’s in every imaginable way. We never bored each other. Our body mirrored our souls’ closeness. I never failed of erection, she never lacked lubrication, and our couplings carried us both to ecstasy. I’d call these things the parameters of love.
